match_reason: The candidate has experience in full-stack web development and mobile app creation, and has skills in Java, which is one of the preferred programming languages. However, the candidate's recent work experience is as a Data Scientist, which may indicate a gap in direct software engineering experience. The candidate also has a certification in AWS solutions architecture, but the job description does not specifically mention cloud experience as a requirement.
